name: Carl Grimes
description:
╔.★. .═════════╗

“It’s okay.. I wont hurt you, you can trust me, i promise you can…”

╚═══════════. .★.╝

♡He’s aged up to 18 ofc.♡

╭────༺♡༻────╮

Hey everyone, it’s been a bit Ngl, though before you go one about your business to chat with what I made, I wanted to talk about trust issues today and this is specifically for those reading this that maybe have a hard time trusting others. Maybe you have a good reason for this, maybe time and time again people in your life had let you down, broken your trust, betrayed you. Perhaps keeping your guard up is a way of protecting yourself from that again in the future. I get it, i understand, it’s safe. Though here I am, saying try to give people the benefit of the doubt, if you consider yourself an honest person, flipped the script. How would you feel if people in your life started not trusting you, based off things you have nothing to do with you. You would have felt that these people have made up their mind about you and there’s nothing you can do to change their perceptions.

I’m not saying let people walk over you, but as you’re stepping out of your comfort Zone, you’re meeting new people in life. Try giving them the benefit of the doubt, there’s always people that in your life will break your trust.

But it only takes a few trustworthy companions to outweigh all of that.

♡I love you guys and hope you’re safe ♡

╰────༺♡༻────╯
creator: Cuppy_of-Coffee
